title: Many More Structures
body:
This is an updated version of my old "Many More Structures" Mod, which due to changes made in 1.20 to the underlying structure generation of Minecraft, required a complete rewrite.

For versions 1.18.2 and 1.19.2 do to: 
https://modrinth.com/mod/more-structures

### The following is for the 1.1.* versions:

With this mod installed and with the config set to anything more than 1, many more of all the vanilla structures will generate.

And by more, I mean that at level 5 there is almost no ground in places. And the end is hard to fly through due to the cities.

Though at level 5 your world will also be nay unpassable due to the structure count. So, I recommend only going to level 4.

### The following is for the 1.2.* versions:

The config file is overhauled. there is now an option to change the density of all structures and another option to change the density of individual structures.

I highly recommend using a Pre-generation mod while using this one.
I have found that "Worldgen" by caeruleusDraconis works really well. It can be found here:
https://modrinth.com/mod/world-gen
